docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2025 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAY-28-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 613, JUDGE ANDREW Y.S. CHENG. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-28-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 613

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2025 BY ANDREW Y.S. CHENG. APPELLANT/DEFENDANT HEMINWAY M LI APPEARED. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF RAED JAMAL BADWAN, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER SOHA ABDOU AGINA, APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ANDREW Y S CHENG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (613)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2025 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BADWAN, RAED JAMAL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LI, HEMINWAY M $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,667.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY BADWAN, RAED JAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT LI, HEMINWAY M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BADWAN, RAED JAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT LI, HEMINWAY M
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, HEMINWAY M

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF RAED JAMAL BADWAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER FAWZI KADDOURA OF GLOBAL TRANSLATION & INTERPRETATION. DEFENDANT HEMMINWAY M. LI IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICER IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BADWAN, RAED JAMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, HEMINWAY M $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,667.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $4,600. IF THE FIRST PAYMENT IS MADE BY APRIL 15, 2025, AND THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT IS PAID BY MAY 15, 2025, MR. BADWAN WAIVES ANY CLAIM TO INTEREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LI, HEMINWAY M MAILED TO RESPONDENT BADWAN, RAED JAMAL
